name: file-provider-progress
title: File Provider Progress
description: Show macOS File Provider upload, download, indexing, and health status.
author: finite

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Optional path to a custom fp-progress binary. Development defaults to the Swift debug build; production defaults to the bundled binary.

preferences.name: timeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Probe Timeout
preferences.description: Maximum time Raycast waits for fp-progress status JSON.

commands.name: status
commands.title: File Provider Progress
commands.subtitle: Sync Status
commands.description: Show current macOS File Provider sync progress.

scripts.dev: npm run package-swift -- debug && FP_PROGRESS_BIN="$PWD/.raycast-swift-build/apple/Products/Debug/fp-progress" ray develop
scripts.lint: ray lint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck
scripts.publish: npm run package-swift -- release && npm run build && npx @raycast/api@latest publish
